title: GenerateRepoOption
description: GenerateRepoOption options when creating repository using a template

avatar.description: include avatar of the template repo

default_branch.description: Default branch of the new repository

description.description: Description of the repository to create

git_content.description: include git content of default branch in template repo

git_hooks.description: include git hooks in template repo

name.description: Name of the repository to create

owner.description: The organization or person who will own the new repository

protected_branch.description: include protected branches in template repo
